message:
test: update integration tests for new APIs and inline reflow policies

Comprehensive test updates to cover new runtime features, API changes,
and ensure compatibility with enhanced diff strategy integration.

inline_reflow_policy.rs:
- Add tests for VOI-based remeasurement triggering
- Test inline auto height adjustment scenarios
- Verify reflow behavior during rapid resize sequences
- Add edge case tests for zero-height and max-height bounds
- Test interaction with conformal predictor thresholds

mpc_vs_pi_evaluation.rs (runtime + render):
- Update controller comparison tests for new evidence types
- Add tests for dirty-row optimization in controlled scenarios
- Verify consistent behavior across MPC and PI strategies
- Test strategy switching during evaluation periods
- Add percentile bounds checking (fix OOB edge cases)

resize_migration_compat.rs:
- Add backwards compatibility tests for resize API
- Test migration from legacy resize handling
- Verify coalescer behavior matches documented semantics
- Add tests for BOCPD regime detection integration

frame_integration.rs:
- Update tests for new widget rendering paths
- Add tests for command palette scoring integration
- Test dialog modal focus management
- Verify help overlay keyboard handling

help_keybind_e2e.rs:
- Update expected help text formatting
- Add tests for new keybinding display features
- Test help overlay dismiss behaviors
- Verify context-sensitive help selection

These tests ensure the new features integrate correctly with existing
functionality and provide regression protection for the enhanced APIs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
